rationale: Hypothesizes that market-maker net gamma flipping from negative to positive marks the end of a high-volatility drawdown regime.
expected_failure_mode: Gamma models based on open interest are estimates and may signal flips prematurely due to hidden OTC positioning.
stop_conditions: hybrid candidate fails Gold all-era economics or Future Confidence
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
Signal lag exceeds 2 days from actual price bottoms.
Produces lower share accumulation than a simple 200 SMA cross.
